title: Lab Technician (Production), NO EXP, 3k – 5k, + completion bonus
description:
PLS read in full for required details before application*

Lab Technician (Production), NO EXP needed, 3k – 5k, + completion bonus - NTU Campus

Overview

An award leading green solar power company in Singapore, ISO Certified withdiverse clients in the commercial and industrial sectors. The company holdsmultiple world solar efficiency records across multiple device structures andsizes while demonstrating robust industrial capabilities through ASEAN’slargest perovskite production line in Singapore.

In this position you will play an integral part of the team with highly skilledspecialists that ‘bring ideas to life’ for our clients across all types of industrialprojects, This role offers the opportunity to specialize in Open Lab operationswith trainings provided for those without experiences

Job Description (Shift require, NO overnight duties)

·       Machine operation on a pilot line of perovskite photovoltaic modules

·       Preparation and optimization of machine operating parameters

·       Analyzing the results with reports,

·       Performing the tests and calibrations

·   Support device fabrication processes under engineers' guidance.

·       Conduct routine testing of perovskite solar cells.

·       Ad – Hoc Assign

Requirements

·       ITS  /  Energy and Chemicals (Diploma in Engineering / material science)

·       Prior laboratory experience in material preparation or testing is advantageous

·        On Site work with west area transport pick up

·       Able to communicate in mandarin due to business needs

The following is mandatory for submission, including your cover letter, which illustrates your skills and experiences for each segment as of requirements. [ mailto:meyers@oaktree.com.sg]

·        Cover letter + Detail resume (with clear dates of each tenure)

·        Date of birth

·        Citizenship/ Work pass status

·        Current salary

·        Notice period

·        Reasons for leaving past 3 roles

What You Can Expect from Us  

We succeed together and believe the best inspires the best,so we invest in supporting each other, learning together and celebrating oursuccess.

﻿Our Total Rewards program reflects ourcommitment to helping you achieve your career ambitions, recognizing yourcontributions, investing in your well-being and providing competitive benefitsand pay.

We can’t wait to see where your ambitions take you.

Apply today!

  1. Oaktree Technology

We believe in ensuring every stage of our service process is professionally conducted and reviewing every resume submitted to ensure the candidate meet the right skills, qualifications and personality to perform to our client’s expectations.
